cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees frequently cite competitive pay and comprehensive insurance as primary benefits of working at the company.

cluster_summaries.label: Growth & Recognition
cluster_summaries.summary: Many staff members appreciate the availability of professional development resources and the ability to grow within the organization.

cluster_summaries.label: Flexibility & Care
cluster_summaries.summary: A segment of the workforce values the company's flexible work arrangements and supportive culture, though this is role-dependent.

cluster_summaries.label: Stagnation
cluster_summaries.summary: Reports of nepotism and a lack of clear, merit-based advancement paths suggest frustration with internal promotion processes.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsafe or Unfair Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Some employees express concerns regarding management favoritism, inadequate handling of harassment, and a lack of transparency in leadership.
